class Solution:
    def maximumTotalDamage(self, power: List[int]) -> int:
        from collections import Counter
        import bisect

        # Count the frequency of each power value
        freq = Counter(power)
        unique_powers = sorted(freq.keys())

        # dp[i] will store the maximum total damage up to the i-th unique power
        dp = [0] * len(unique_powers)

        # For each unique power, find the maximum total damage
        for i in range(len(unique_powers)):
            current_power = unique_powers[i]
            current_total = freq[current_power] * current_power

            # Find the largest index j where unique_powers[j] < current_power - 2
            j = bisect.bisect_left(unique_powers, current_power - 2) - 1

            if j >= 0:
                current_total += dp[j]

            # Update dp[i] with the maximum value
            dp[i] = max(dp[i - 1], current_total) if i > 0 else current_total

        return dp[-1]
